SELECT fp.id, fp.author_id AS authorId, fp.title, fp.summary, fp.content, fp.nickname, fp.avatar, ua.nickname AS authorNickname, ua.avatar AS authorAvatar, fp.view_count AS viewCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.page = CONCAT('forum-post-', fp.id) AND c.status = TRUE ) AS commentCount, fp.is_pinned AS isPinned, fp.is_featured AS isFeatured, fp.create_time AS createTime, fp.update_time AS updateTime, GREATEST( <<<<<<< HEAD COALESCE(fp.last_activity_time, fp.update_time, fp.create_time), COALESCE( ( SELECT MAX(c.create_time) FROM comment c WHERE c.page = CONCAT('forum-post-', fp.id) AND c.status = TRUE ), fp.create_time ) ) AS lastActivityTime FROM forum_post fp LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON fp.author_id = ua.id ======= COALESCE(fp.last_activity_time, fp.update_time, fp.create_time), COALESCE( ( SELECT MAX(c.create_time) FROM comment c WHERE c.page = CONCAT('forum-post-', fp.id) AND c.status = TRUE ), fp.create_time ) ) AS lastActivityTime FROM forum_post fp LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON fp.author_id = ua.id >>>>>>> df87942a53c2717282b884e9e8b7a7f8444e1cc8
AND ( <<<<<<< HEAD fp.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR fp.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR fp.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

<<<<<<< HEAD
======= >>>>>>> df87942a53c2717282b884e9e8b7a7f8444e1cc8
ORDER BY fp.is_pinned DESC, fp.is_featured DESC, commentCount DESC, fp.view_count DESC, lastActivityTime DESC
ORDER BY fp.is_featured DESC, fp.is_pinned DESC, lastActivityTime DESC, fp.create_time DESC
ORDER BY fp.is_pinned DESC, lastActivityTime DESC, fp.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post fp
WHERE fp.id = #{id}
WHERE fp.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY fp.is_pinned DESC, lastActivityTime DESC, fp.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
UPDATE forum_post
is_pinned = #{isPinned}, is_featured = #{isFeatured}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
<<<<<<< HEAD
SELECT fp.id, fp.author_id AS authorId, fp.title, fp.summary, fp.content, fp.nickname, fp.email, fp.avatar, fp.view_count AS viewCount, fp.comment_count AS commentCount, fp.like_count AS likeCount, fp.is_pinned AS isPinned, fp.is_featured AS isFeatured, fp.status, fp.create_time AS createTime, fp.update_time AS updateTime, fp.last_activity_time AS lastActivityTime FROM forum_post fp
WHERE fp.status = 1
AND (fp.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR fp.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY fp.is_pinned DESC,
fp.view_count ${query.order}
fp.create_time ${query.order}
fp.last_activity_time ${query.order}
LIMIT #{offset}, #{query.size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post fp WHERE fp.status = 1
AND (fp.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR fp.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
WHERE fp.id = #{id}
INSERT INTO forum_post ( author_id, title, summary, content, nickname, email, avatar, view_count, comment_count, like_count, is_pinned, is_featured, status, create_time, update_time, last_activity_time ) VALUES ( #{authorId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{viewCount}, #{commentCount}, #{likeCount}, #{isPinned}, #{isFeatured}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{lastActivityTime} )
UPDATE forum_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, update_time = #{updateTime}, last_activity_time = #{lastActivityTime} WHERE id = #{id}
DELETE FROM forum_post WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId}
WHERE fp.author_id = #{authorId} AND fp.status = 1 ORDER BY fp.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 1
WHERE (fp.is_pinned = 1 OR fp.is_featured = 1) AND fp.status = 1 ORDER BY fp.is_pinned DESC, fp.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
======= >>>>>>> df87942a53c2717282b884e9e8b7a7f8444e1cc8
